routes.purpose: 获取用户列表，按最新记录倒序返回
获取用户总数、性别统计和平均年龄
新增用户记录
更新指定用户信息
删除指定用户
清空全部用户记录

notes: Use snake_case fields exactly: id, name, gender, age, created_at, updated_at.
Register /api/users/stats before /api/users/:id to avoid Express route shadowing.
GET /api/users should return a bare array, not wrapped in an object.
POST and PUT should return the created/updated user record so frontend state can update safely.
DELETE /api/users/:id should return a structured success payload with the deleted id.
DELETE /api/users should support the clear-all action and return a structured success payload.
Stats response should be a bare object with keys: total, male_count, female_count, other_count, avg_age.
Validate age range 0-120 and accepted gender values male/female/other in backend as well.
releaseManifest.releaseStrategy: Convert the localStorage-based prototype into an API-driven CRUD app with a single persisted users entity, explicit stats endpoint, and migration-safe SQLite schema. Keep field names aligned with the prototype and return concrete record/aggregate shapes that the frontend can read directly.

新增用户记录
更新指定用户信息

清空全部用户记录

notes: Use snake_case fields exactly: id, name, gender, age, created_at, updated_at.
Register /api/users/stats before /api/users/:id to avoid Express route shadowing.
GET /api/users should return a bare array, not wrapped in an object.
POST and PUT should return the created/updated user record so frontend state can update safely.
DELETE /api/users/:id should return a structured success payload with the deleted id.
DELETE /api/users should support the clear-all action and return a structured success payload.
Stats response should be a bare object with keys: total, male_count, female_count, other_count, avg_age.
Validate age range 0-120 and accepted gender values male/female/other in backend as well.
releaseManifest.releaseStrategy: Convert the localStorage-based prototype into an API-driven CRUD app with a single persisted users entity, explicit stats endpoint, and migration-safe SQLite schema. Keep field names aligned with the prototype and return concrete record/aggregate shapes that the frontend can read directly.

rewrites.target: 'SELECT id, name, gender, age, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE id = ?'
'SELECT id, name, gender, age, created_at, updated_at FROM users ORDER BY id DESC'

"SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN gender = 'male' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_count, SUM(CASE WHEN gender = 'female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS female_count, SUM(CASE WHEN gender = 'other' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS other_count, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(age), 0), 1) AS avg_age FROM users"
'INSERT INTO users (name, gender, age, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)'
'UPDATE users SET name = ?, gender = ?, age = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?'

routes.purpose: 获取用户列表，按最新记录倒序返回 bare array
获取用户总数、性别统计和平均年龄
新增用户记录并返回创建后的完整用户对象
更新指定用户并返回更新后的完整用户对象
删除指定用户并返回包含 deleted_id 的成功结果
清空全部用户记录并返回结构化成功结果

notes: 保留 snake_case 字段名：id,name,gender,age,created_at,updated_at
GET /api/users 必须返回 bare array，不要包裹在 data 字段中
GET /api/users/stats 必须返回 bare object，键为 total,male_count,female_count,other_count,avg_age
POST /api/users 和 PUT /api/users/:id 必须返回完整用户记录，便于前端直接更新状态
DELETE /api/users/:id 返回结构化成功结果，至少包含 success 和 deleted_id
DELETE /api/users 支持清空全部记录并返回结构化成功结果
后端需校验 gender 仅允许 male/female/other，age 范围为 0-120
Express 注册顺序中 /api/users/stats 必须先于 /api/users/:id
按 updated_at 或 id 倒序返回用户列表，保证最新记录优先显示
schema 需幂等且覆盖 backend 实际查询与写入所需全部列
releaseManifest.releaseStrategy: 将 localStorage 原型改为 API-driven 单实体 CRUD 应用，持久化 users 到 SQLite，前端只通过显式 /api/users 与 /api/users/stats 读写数据，后端严格返回与前端直接兼容的 bare array / bare object / 完整记录形状，schema 采用 migration-safe 的 users 表定义。

routes.purpose: 获取用户列表，按最新更新时间倒序返回 bare array
获取用户总数、性别统计和平均年龄，返回 bare object
新增用户并返回创建后的完整用户对象
更新指定用户并返回更新后的完整用户对象
删除指定用户并返回包含 success 和 deleted_id 的结果
清空全部用户记录并返回结构化成功结果

notes: 保留实体名 users 与字段名 id,name,gender,age,created_at,updated_at，不做重命名
GET /api/users 必须返回 bare array，不能包裹 data
GET /api/users/stats 必须返回 bare object，键为 total,male_count,female_count,other_count,avg_age
POST /api/users 与 PUT /api/users/:id 必须返回完整用户记录，便于前端直接更新状态
DELETE /api/users/:id 返回至少包含 success 和 deleted_id
DELETE /api/users 返回结构化成功结果用于清空全部
后端需校验 gender 仅允许 male、female、other，age 范围为 0-120
Express 路由顺序中 /api/users/stats 必须先于 /api/users/:id
用户列表按 updated_at DESC, id DESC 返回，保证最新记录优先显示
schema 需覆盖 backend 实际查询与写入所需全部列，并可重复安全执行
releaseManifest.releaseStrategy: 将当前 localStorage 原型转换为 API-driven 单实体 users CRUD 应用，前端只通过显式 /api/users 与 /api/users/stats 访问 SQLite 持久化数据，后端严格保持 snake_case 字段与约定的 bare array、bare object、完整记录返回形状，schema 使用幂等且兼容演进的 users 表定义。
